absence_3_lessons: Hello! Your son/daughter {{studentName}} has been absent for 3 lessons in a row. Please contact the «Atlas» educational center.
birthday_greeting: Happy birthday, {{name}}! The «Atlas» educational center team wishes you success in your studies and all the best!

schedule_changed: Notice: a schedule change for group {{groupName}}. Please check the updated schedule.
